title: Future Tenses
topics: will · going to · present continuous for future · future time expressions
description: Budoucí čas — will, going to, present continuous.

quiz.sentence: You look cold. I ___ get you a blanket. (spontaneous offer)
She ___ start a new job next Monday. (arranged appointment)
They ___ travel around Asia next year. (plan already decided)
I think robots ___ replace many jobs in the future. (prediction)

tasks: 1. Write your plans for next weekend using 'going to' (5 sentences)
2. Write 3 predictions about the world in 2050 using 'will'
3. Write your diary for tomorrow using present continuous
